subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Sever the cord of my attachment from all things, sanctify me from all things, strip me bare of all things, and make me pure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب اقطع حبل تعلقی عن کل شیء و قدسنی عن کل شیء و جردنی عن کل شیء و اخلص
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for detachment
